PRODUCTS.LIST_SUBTITLE: View and edit your product stock and prices
PRODUCTS.EMPTY_DESC: Start by adding products from the general catalog
PRODUCTS.BANK_SUBTITLE: Choose from available products in the master catalog
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_HINT: If you can't find the product, you can request to add it
PRODUCTS.REQUESTS_SUBTITLE: Track the product, brand, and category requests you have sent to the Coupony team.
PRODUCTS.REQUESTS_EMPTY_DESC: When you submit a new product, brand, or category request, it will appear here right away.
PRODUCTS.AGREE_POLICIES: I agree to product listing and pricing policies.
PRODUCTS.CATALOG_DESC_NOTE: This description comes from the master catalog and cannot be edited here.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_MISSING_BRAND_HINT: Turn this on if the product belongs to a brand that does not exist yet.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_MISSING_CATEGORY_HINT: Turn this on if you need a completely new category for this product.
PRODUCTS.BRAND_MODAL_DESC: Pick an existing brand or create a new one.
PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_MODAL_DESC: Pick an existing category or add a new one with hierarchy details.
PRODUCTS.DETAILS_SUBTITLE: Review product details, pricing, and stock.
PRODUCTS.DISCOUNT_HELPER: Enter the discount percentage to calculate the original price automatically.
PRODUCTS.PRICING_STOCK_HINT: Update prices and stock — changes apply to your store immediately.
PRODUCTS.CATALOG_INFO_HINT: Data from the master catalog — read only.
PRODUCTS.TRADE_PRICE_REQUIRED_NOTE: This product needs a trade price before it is ready for live orders.
PRODUCTS.VALIDATION_INCOMPLETE: Please make sure to fill all required fields correctly (like selling price and trade price).
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_NEW_SUBTITLE: Submit a request to add a new product to the master catalog.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_ACTION_HEALTHY: Stock looks healthy for current order flow. Keep the count aligned with your actual shelf quantity.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_ACTION_LOW: Stock is getting tight. Refill soon so automatic pickup deduction does not push the item out of stock.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_ACTION_OUT: This item is already out of stock. Restock first before reactivating or promoting it.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_AUTOMATION_BODY: Inventory now follows the live order flow. Quantity is deducted when the driver picks up the order, then restored automatically if delivery fails or the order is refunded.
PRODUCTS.SUBMIT_NEW_PRODUCT_DESC: If you cannot find your product in the catalog, request to add it now.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_SUBMITTED_SUCCESS: Product request submitted successfully, it will be reviewed by admin.

BULK.TITLE: Bulk Add From Product Bank
BULK.SUBTITLE: Review trade price, selling price, and stock before submit.
BULK.DEFAULTS_HINT: Apply default values to selected rows or to all rows at once.
BULK.SUBMIT_ERROR: Bulk add could not be submitted. Review the data and try again.

VALIDATION.TRADE_REQUIRED: Trade price is required and must be greater than zero.
VALIDATION.SELLING_REQUIRED: Selling price is required and must be greater than zero.
VALIDATION.TRADE_GT_SELLING: Trade price cannot be greater than selling price.
VALIDATION.DISCOUNT_RANGE: Discount percentage must be between 0 and less than 100.

ERRORS.ALREADY_EXISTS: Product already exists in your store.
ERRORS.BRANCH_INVALID: Branch is invalid for this vendor.
ERRORS.COMPARE_PRICE_INVALID: Compare-at price must be greater than selling price.
ERRORS.TRADE_GT_SELLING: Trade price must be less than or equal to selling price.
ERRORS.MIN_ORDER_INVALID: Minimum order quantity must be greater than zero.
ERRORS.MAX_ORDER_INVALID: Maximum order quantity must be greater than or equal to minimum order quantity.
ERRORS.DUPLICATE_ITEMS: Duplicate products are not allowed in the same bulk request.
ERRORS.BRANCHES_INVALID: One or more branch IDs do not belong to this vendor.
